Jazz.description: High harmonic tension, high rhythmic complexity, moderate spectral density

Classical.description: Moderate across all dials with European art-music balance

Gamelan.description: Moderate harmonic tension, high rhythmic complexity, high spectral density

Gagaku.description: The 'most pleasing' tradition — highest spectral density

Hindustani.description: High harmonic tension (raga), complex rhythms (tala), moderate spectral density

African Polyrhythm.description: Low harmonic tension, very high rhythmic complexity, moderate spectral density

EDM.description: Low harmonic tension, moderate rhythm, very high spectral density

Blues.description: Moderate-high harmonic tension (blue notes), moderate rhythm, moderate spectral

Hip-hop.description: Low harmonic tension, high rhythmic complexity, high spectral density

Latin.description: Moderate harmonic tension, high rhythmic complexity (clave-based), moderate spectral
